description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Builds that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow has three jobs: CMake, Autotools, and SCons. The CMake job runs on multiple operating systems with different configurations, installs dependencies, configures and builds the project with CMake, and runs tests. The Autotools job runs on Linux and macOS, installs dependencies, configures and builds the project with Autotools, and runs tests. The SCons job runs on multiple operating systems and architectures, installs dependencies, builds the project with SCons, and archives and uploads the distribution.
